title: Interim Disability Assistance Scheme for the Elderly (IDAPE)
text:
Interim Disability Assistance Scheme for the Elderly (IDAPE) - SupportGoWhere
Interim Disability Assistance Scheme for the Elderly (IDAPE)
Share link
Provides monthly cash payout for elderly Singapore Citizens with disabilities and who were not eligible for ElderShield at the time, due to not meeting age criteria or they had pre-existing disabilities.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive $150 or $250 monthly cash payout for up to 72 months
Processing time takes up to 8 weeks
Apply through AIC’s eService portal (eFASS)
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

For seniors who develop severe disabilities, they can receive $150 or $250 monthly cash payout (depending on their financial circumstances) for up to 72 months.

Who is this for?

Born on or before 30 September 1932; or

Born between 1 October 1932 and 30 September 1962 (both dates inclusive), with pre-existing disabilities as of 30 September 2002.

Must be a Singapore Citizen and lives in Singapore

Monthly household income per capita of less than or equal to $3,600 (or property annual value of $21,000 or below for households with no income)

As of 1 Oct 2024,

Household Monthly Income Per Person

	

Household Monthly Income Per Person 




$0-$2,600

	

$250




$2,601 - $3,600 

	

$150




Must not be a policyholder of CareShield Life and/or supplement, or, ElderShield and/or supplement

Did not make any claims for CareShield Life and/or supplement, or, ElderShield and/or supplement

How to apply?

Contact an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor for a severe disability assessment. See list of assessors.

You can apply:

Online at the AIC eService Portal, or

At any of the AIC Links

Where can I find help?

View more details

AIC Hotline: 1800 650 6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit the AIC Link branch nearest to you

Scheme last updated 26 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
